notes: Master-Reorg R-3b part 2 (Path A) — Blast Radius re-homed from the Platforms strip to the Deploy detail. Redesign-only, legacy byte-identical. Blast Radius is deployment-scoped (its empty-state literally says 'Start or resume a deployment') so per Design Law 2 it belongs in the Deploy flow, not the Platforms reference. renderBlastRadius + its two interactive sub-renders (brCsvReopen, _br_applySimDecoration) all hard-targeted the legacy id #br-wrap in 3 places; Path A introduces a settable render target — a module-level _br_target + _br_wrap() helper (default = #br-wrap, with a document.body.contains() guard that falls back if the deploy container was torn down). renderBlastRadius(targetEl) sets the target when passed one; the no-arg internal re-renders (sim enter/exit) preserve it. New OPS_TABS.blast renders the blast radius into a fresh id-less .br-wrap div inside the passed container (no duplicate #br-wrap id). Deploy detail Row 2.4 gains a full-width BLAST RADIUS button (deploy_detailTool(id,'blast')) mirroring the R-2a BURNDOWN/AUDITS pattern (‹Back → deploy_showDetail, no nav_push → no shared-router touch); a DEPLOY_TOOLS 'blast' entry supplies the back-title. The Blast Radius pill is now hidden from the re-homed #rf-hw pwr-sub strip (regex /pw-rb|pw-rm|pw-blast/ in redesign_homeHardware) — the strip shows Power / LED-GPU / Thermal, and Deploy is Blast Radius's sole redesign door (no stranding, no dup ids). The old rd_openPower door was already dead code (POWER merged into PLATFORMS in .173, zero call sites) — noted for R1 deletion, untouched here. Legacy: redesign_homeHardware + the Row 2.4 button + OPS_TABS.blast door are all redesign-gated, and #br-wrap/pw-blast markup is unchanged, so ?legacy=1 shows the full six-pill Power strip rendering into #br-wrap, byte-identical. No new assets (blast reuses phantom-tool-power-256.webp, already precached); CSS unchanged; 3-stamp lockstep; gates green (4 script blocks compile, braces balanced, CRLF preserved). This closes the R-3b pill cleanup. DEVICE-VERIFY (HARD-STOP, clear SW cache first): (1) Crash Cart → PLATFORMS → open any platform → sub-strip has NO Rack Map and NO Blast Radius pill (Power/LED-GPU/Thermal only). (2) Work → Deploy → open a deployment → detail shows a BLAST RADIUS button under BURNDOWN/AUDITS → tap it → the floor power map renders in the detail (or the 'No active deployment/topology' empty-state); ‹Back returns to the deployment detail; the RE-IMPORT and simulation trip/exit interactions still work inside the detail. (3) ?legacy=1 → Power page still has the Blast Radius sub-tab rendering into #br-wrap, byte-identical. ROLLBACK: revert the commit.
